title: Luminous Charred Polish Ham Toast
description: A silky, charred toast topped with creamy eggs and savory serrano ham, finished with a touch of smoked paprika and fresh thyme for a pop of color.
instructions: Heat a skillet over medium heat and add butter, letting it melt until foamy.
Add garlic and sauté until fragrant, about 30 seconds.
Insert bread slices and grill each side until slightly charred, about 2 minutes per side.
While bread is toasting, lay serrano ham on a plate and lightly brush with olive oil.
Once bread is done, spread a thin layer of butter on the hot surface of each slice.
Lay ham slices over the buttered toast and sprinkle smoked paprika evenly.
Crack the eggs over the ham, season with salt and pepper, and cover the skillet to poach until whites set, about 3 minutes.
Remove the skillet, sprinkle chopped thyme over the eggs, and serve immediately.
